my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or specific linting rules enabled in the migration recipe).
